title: Functions should avoid having more than one argument of type bool
description: bool is often used to implement an enum with two values. But when used carelessly, this leads to error-prone code. While it may seem reasonable when defining a boolean function parameter, the meaning might not be so clear at the function call point.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Functions should avoid having more than one argument of type bool. Consider using enum classes or structs for better readability.
